# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    global: true
    config:
      origins: 
        - "http://example.com"
        - "http://another-example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "PUT"
        - "DELETE"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "X-Requested-With"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Accept"
      exposed_headers: 
        - "X-Custom-Header"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true

  - name: key-auth
    global: false
    config: {}

  - name: rate-limiting
    global: false
    config:
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000

services:
  - name: my-service
    url: http://my-service-url
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config: {}
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 50

routes:
  - name: my-route
    service: my-service
    paths:
      - /my-api
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        config:
          origins: 
            - "http://example.com"
            - "http://another-example.com"
          methods: 
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
          headers: 
            - "Authorization"
            - "X-Requested-With"
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Accept"
          exposed_headers: 
            - "X-Custom-Header"
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: true
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 10
